name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.07: combo deals rebuilt as product groups (pick one from each of up to 3 groups → fixed price or % off), each group using the catalog typeahead; the "specific machines" scope picker is now searchable with a live match count. Product picker generalised to work per-target. Builds on v5.06.
